messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: ESCALATE verdict is deterministic, gate-clean, and binding. No repair path exists for destination mismatch through worker iteration. Route to FINAL_COMPILER to produce export hold notification. Preserve worker 1 artifact as canonical record.

next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: All worker 1 source bindings and critical features preserved

routing_diagnosis.root_cause: LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match SHIP-SIE-073 destination Chile

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Exact-match policy satisfied in identification; failed in application due to license/shipment destination conflict

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match: license destination Peru conflicts with shipment Chile per STD-SIE-073-P exact-match rule.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match SHIP-SIE-073 Chile; policy requires full ECCN/destination/end-user/date match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect open: destination mismatch blocks execution; WARN-SIE-073 reinforces need for exact evidence.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective date matches but destination and policy exact-match fail before 2026-06-28 export.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE required. Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 to Chile conflicts with LIC-SIE-073 Peru destination despite matching ECCN, end user, and date. Policy STD-SIE-073-P demands full exact match before release. WARN-SIE-073 confirms no reliance on partial evidence. Boundary remains open; execution blocked until corrected license evidence provided.
open_blockers: destination mismatch between LIC-SIE-073 and SHIP-SIE-073

action.description: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad dual-use warning remains visible, while export license evidence may exactly match the current shipment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Peru, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
